result.markdown:
---
title: "osf"
format: html
---


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(metacheck)
library(tidyverse)
```
:::



## One paper


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
paper <- psychsci[10:20]
links <- osf_links(paper)
contents <- osf_info(links,
                         recursive = TRUE, 
                         find_project = TRUE)
summary <- file_category(contents)

summary |> filter(kind == "file") |> select(name, filetype, file_category)
```
:::


## Fix the summary table


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# code to fix any problems
expected <- summary |>
  select(id, text, osf_id, name, osf_type, kind, filetype, file_category) |>
  mutate(file_category = ifelse(name == "data_experiment1'.txt", "data", file_category))

expected
```
:::



### Make Module

Paste code below into osf_module.R file


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# very basic module

osf_module <- function(paper) {
  links <- osf_links(paper)
  contents <- osf_info(links,
                           recursive = TRUE, 
                           find_project = TRUE)
  summary <- file_category(contents)
  
  #return
  list(
    check = 1,
    summary = summary
  )
}
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# test module
mod_output <- module_run(paper, "osf_module.R")
```
:::


## Validate


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
v <- validate(paper, "osf_module.R", 
              summary = expected,
              check = 1)

v$observed
```
:::
